title: Sterigmostemum purpurascens
taxonomy: Sterigmostemum purpurascens is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a species of plant that belongs to the genus Sterigmostemum. The plant's classification is further divided into the kingdom Plantae and the division Magnoliophyta. Within the plant kingdom, it is classified as a flowering plant, specifically a dicotyledon. This classification places Sterigmostemum purpurascens among other flowering plants that are characterized by having two cotyledons in their seeds.
